text:
The following code

```
def test(throw=True):
    pass

test(throw=False)
```

Gives the following error:

```
Traceback (most recent call last):
  module editor line 100
    traceback.print_exc(file=sys.stderr)
  module $exec_267 line 4
    test(throw=False)
TypeError: test() got an unexpected keyword argument 'throw'
```

(Tested in the Brython.info editor, brython version 3.2.7)

This probably has to do with 'throw' being a javascript keyword.
